_meta.description: Sponsored Products ad-group-level negative product targets (ASIN / category exclusions). Daily snapshot — every fire upserts the full current set. Sourced via Ads-API v3 paginated POST /sp/negativeTargets/list. targeting_expression is a JSON-stringified array of Amazon's clause shapes; parse to extract the negated ASIN(s) or category id(s).
_meta.retention_note: rows older than 2 days are pruned nightly (newest snapshot per store never pruned where applicable); query beyond the window returns a report_date_note

columns.note: Marketplace this ads row belongs to. Query ads data per (store, country_code) directly — no need to reverse-map profile_id.

columns.comment: Marketplace-local date the snapshot was captured.
Server-side timestamp the row was UPSERTed.
Amazon's target identifier — stable across snapshots.
Campaign id this negative scopes to.
Ad group id this negative scopes to.

JSON-stringified array of Amazon's targeting clauses, e.g. '[{"type":"asinSameAs","value":"B07XYZ"}]'. Parse to extract the negated ASIN(s) or category id(s). Other clause types: 'asinCategorySameAs' (category id), 'asinBrandSameAs' (brand id).
Any Amazon response fields not promoted to a typed column.
